title: Pink Glazed Japanese Strawberry Sushi
description: A cultured and crunchy Japanese dish featuring strawberries and a sweet glaze, served on a tagliere for a nostalgic treat.

ingredients.name: Pink glaze
ingredients.notes: made from strawberry puree and sugar

instructions: Prepare the short grain rice according to the package instructions and let it cool.
Cut the noru sheets into small pieces and set them aside.
In a small bowl, mix the rice vinegar, sugar, and salt to create the seasoning mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix the pink glaze and sliced strawberries together.
To assemble the sushi, lay a small piece of noru sheet flat on the tagliere.
Place a small amount of cooled rice on top of the noru sheet.
Add a few slices of strawberry on top of the rice.
Drizzle the pink glaze over the strawberries.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds and fresh mint leaves over the top for garnish.
Repeat the assembly process until all ingredients are used up.
